case_title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO VS. MATT NOORI et al

docket_entries.description: CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO KENNETH A. GRANT BY COURT AT SMALL CLAIM HEARING OF JAN-03-2011 AT 1:30PM.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NOORI, MATT DBA EASY RENT A CAR $3,864.01 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,864.01, DEFENDANT KENNETH GRANT DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE - NO PROOF OF SERVICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-03-2011 - JUDGMENT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. COMMISSIONER: PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED OCT-26-2010, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT NOORI, MATT DBA EASY RENT A CAR
DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE -ATTEMPTED SERVICE UNSUCCESSFUL- FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO AS TO DEFENDANT GRANT, KENNETH A. JR.

AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,104.00 FILED BY CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO AS TO DEFENDANT NOORI, MATT DBA EASY RENT A CAR GRANT, KENNETH A. JR. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-03-2011 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
